creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #10)

You was confused by Synaptics VendorId decoded by Slackware as `Synaptics, Inc.`. Really your touchpad is not truly Synaptics as it does not implement one of Synaptics proprietary protocols. It is USB HID touchpad so one should use usbhid as keyword for search. I typed `usbhid freebsd` in google site and after that [1] appeared on 6-th line of output. May be we should copy it to Wiki as separate page and extend with your case but I do not have Wiki credentials too.  

[1] https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/howto-enabling-multimedia-keys-gamepads-joysticks-for-desktop-usbhid.84464/
